prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏高，该校在新疆理科投放了相关热门专业招生计划；新疆2025年理科考生约52538人，2026年总考生约23 8000人，按近年理科占比约68.6%估算，2026年理科考生约16.3万人，较2025年大幅增加，竞争显著加剧。；中国石油大学 （华东）位于山东青岛，非本省高校，在新疆招生属跨省招生；该校在山东本省招生占比较高，在新疆的招生规模相对稳定，地域偏好因素影响有限。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 6576, in 2024 approximately 6507, and in 2025 approximately 5971. Over the past three years, the ranking has shown a forward trend (decreasing ranking number), with 2025 moving forward by about 605 places compared to 2023 and about 536 places compared to 2024, indicating an overall increase in application popularity. The university's enrollment plan for science students in Xinjiang: 246 in 2023, 234 in 2024, 234 in 2025, and 230 in 2026. Compared to 2025, the 2026 plan reduces enrollment by 4 students (-1.7%), a slight contraction that slightly tightens competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 73rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, fluctuating between 60-73 in recent years, overall at the upper-middle level nationally. In recent reputation monitoring, no significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission records have been observed; its Douyin popularity has not entered the national top 100, with overall attention stable and no major events affecting application psychology. The university is renowned for its petroleum and petrochemical characteristics, with petroleum engineering, oil and gas storage and transportation engineering, and chemical engineering and technology as traditional advantageous directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to have high social popularity. The university has allocated enrollment plans for these popular majors in Xinjiang science admissions. In 2025, there were approximately 52,538 science examinees in Xinjiang; the total number of examinees in 2026 is about 238,000. Estimating the science proportion at about 68.6% in recent years, the number of science examinees in 2026 is about 163,000, a significant increase from 2025, sharply intensifying competition. China University of Petroleum (East China) is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university, so its admissions in Xinjiang are cross-provincial. The university has a high proportion of admissions in its home province of Shandong, while its enrollment scale in Xinjiang is relatively stable, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the forward trend in historical rankings (increased application popularity), the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-1.7%), and the significant increase in the number of science examinees in Xinjiang (intensified competition), based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 5971, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 5940, with a range of 5440-6440.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 5440-6440, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<5440), prioritize popular engineering majors such as computer science, electrical engineering, and electronic information. If the ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>6440), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors and consider the cost-effectiveness of petroleum core majors (such as oil and gas storage and transportation, petroleum engineering).
